name: Squaredle | Daily Word Search Puzzle
snippet: Play Squaredle by dragging from letter to letter to spell out words . For another fun challenge, try the smaller Squaredle Express puzzle found in the Share menu ...

name: Squaredle - The word search puzzle game!
snippet:
Choose the First Letter · Adjacent letters may form a word. Try to find words with at least 4 letters! · Find the Hidden Words! Read more
How to Play Squaredle? Start from a letter that you think could be the beginning of a word and search for possible words in adjacent tiles. Adjacent letters may form a word. Try to find words with at least 4 letters! We started with the letter R and noticed that the letter U could be part of a word.

name: Squardle
snippet: How to play Squardle. Squardle is a Wordle variation where you solve a board of interlocking words in a 5x5 grid by guessing words and getting colored hints. Read more

name: Square Word Game strategy tips needed
snippet: I've got a new game, Square Word. What you do is input a five-letter word on the top pale blue line . When you hit, Enter, the letters fall. Read more

name: Frequently Asked Questions
snippet: Reveal 4 words every day : You can reveal a 4, 5, or 6-letter word, four times per puzzle. Premium icon next to your leaderboard scores. 45° board rotation ... Read more

name: How do I play? : Squaredle Support
snippet: Find words by swiping to connecting letters up, down, left, right, diagonally, and around corners. You can swipe up to the top of the page to quickly cancel a word without impacting your accuracy.
